title: Canonical Event Schema
description: Pinscore v1 — frozen canonical event structure

creator_id.description: Creator identifier — always sourced from JWT

fan_id.description: Fan identifier — nullable when platform does not expose identity

event_type.description: Atomic fan action type — maps to deterministic weight

value.description: Event magnitude — stored, not derived — default 1

metadata.description: Optional structured context — must not override required fields — max 5KB

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp — timezone indicator required
